intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Something big in the woods behind my house. Couldn't make it out clearly.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Bigger. And it was walking upright. I think.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: You think. So you're not sure.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: It was dark. But something was definitely there.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Upright and larger than a bear. Worth noting.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: That's what I figured. Wanted to report it.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Keep an eye out. Thanks for calling.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Saw something weird in the woods. Big shape moving around.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: No. Too dark. But it wasn't a deer or anything normal.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Moose can look pretty weird in low light.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Trust your instincts. You know what's normal in your area.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: {callerName} from {callerLocation}, what's happening in your neck of the woods?

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Strange sighting, Vern. Large figure moving through the trees at dusk.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Can you describe it in more detail?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Dark, bulky. Moved smoothly for something that big. Gone before I could get a good look.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Dusk plays tricks on the eyes. Could've been a large animal.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: Maybe. But I've lived here thirty years. Never seen anything like it.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Thirty years and this is new. That's significant.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: That's why I called. Something's changed.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Document any future sightings. We'll track the pattern.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Maybe, Vern. Something big moving through the forest. Didn't get a clear view.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: What made you think it wasn't just wildlife?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: The way it moved. Deliberate. And it seemed to notice me watching.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Animals notice when they're being watched. Natural instinct.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: This felt different. Like it was assessing me.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Awareness of being observed. That suggests intelligence.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: That's the vibe I got. Unsettling.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Set up a trail camera if you can. We need evidence.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: {callerName} from {callerLocation}! What'd you see out there?!

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Something in the woods, Vern! Big! Moving between the trees!

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Could you make out what it was?!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Not clearly! But it was HUGE and it moved like nothing I've seen before!

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Could've been a bear - they look massive standing up!

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: Maybe! But it didn't move like a bear!

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Unusual movement pattern! That's a key indicator!

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Get a camera out there! We need to document this!
